name: Takashima & Co., Ltd.
summary: Takashima & Co., Ltd. operates as a trading company in Japan. The company's Construction Supply Division provides energy and insulation solutions; construction materials for the use in civil works and construction supply; and housing materials, as well as construction and fabrication services for residential materials, equipment, and interior related needs. Its Industrial Materials Division offers a range of services from planning to operation in the promotion of energy saving, such as LED lighting renovation and installing EV chargers in parking for commercial facilities; designs and develops interior materials; provides composite molded plastic products and sub materials; and offers OEM and ODM related design and production procurement services. This division also engages in the manufacture, construction, and maintenance of sheet houses and other membrane structures; provision of buffering materials, and specialized containers used in the medical field; and rental and sale of collaborative robots. The company was formerly known as Takashimaya Kogyou Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Takashima & Co., Ltd. in 1949. Takashima & Co., Ltd. was founded in 1915 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
